config.subtitle: Everything you need to know about my free walking tour through Berlin's historic city center.

items.a: Yes. There is no fixed price and no upfront payment. You reserve a spot for free, walk with me, and decide at the end what the experience was worth to you.
At the end, I collect tips in cash. For a good tour of about 2 hours, €10 per person is the minimum fair tip, €15 is a strong thank-you, and €20+ is generous.
The meeting point is the Weltzeituhr (World Clock) at Alexanderplatz. I use a green umbrella so you can spot me there. Please arrive 5 minutes before the tour starts.
The tour lasts about 2 hours and covers about 3 kilometers on foot, from Alexanderplatz toward Hackescher Markt at a comfortable walking pace.

items.q: Do I need to book in advance?
items.a: Yes. Please book online at [berlinwalk.com](https://www.berlinwalk.com) so I can plan the group size and you have a confirmed free spot.
